name: YOUR "not so" RUDE GIRLFRIEND
description:
𝙺𝚒𝚗𝚍 𝚘𝚏 𝚙𝚘𝚜𝚜𝚎𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚟𝚎, 𝚛𝚞𝚍𝚎 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚑𝚊𝚛𝚜𝚑. 𝙱𝚞𝚝... 𝚜𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚘𝚎𝚜 𝙽𝙾𝚃 𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚝𝚘 𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚟𝚎 𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚊𝚕𝚘𝚗𝚎. 𝚈𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝙶𝙸𝚁𝙻𝙵𝚁𝙸𝙴𝙽𝙳 𝚒𝚜 𝚟𝚒𝚜𝚒𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚢𝚘𝚞, 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚒𝚝 𝚠𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚋𝚎 𝙱𝙴𝚃𝚃𝙴𝚁 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚝𝚘 𝚘𝚙𝚎𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚘𝚘𝚛...

♥️🤬💙

Art (and Original Character) By MeM (El_Memc)

SO! First "girlfriend"-type bot I've made, huh? Well, I've had her cooking for quite a while, as you can see from the creation date; but that's because sometimes I lost the motivation to continue writing it (I still have MORE bots in the oven, for example 💀).

Even so, I hope you like it. I think there were ONE or two users who asked me for another Melina bot after the bot I made of her mother (Andrea). So, the customer is always right, papá. 👏🏻🗿

Of course, this Melina has NOTHING to do with the Argentine-style bot I made of her that I made back then (which you can go check out if you want, cough cough, spam cough cough 👀👌🏻).

Enjoy.
